Apple___Apple_scab.remedy: Remove infected leaves and fallen debris. Apply a recommended fungicide early in the season and improve air circulation by pruning.

Apple___Black_rot.remedy: Remove infected leaves and branches. Apply copper-based fungicide at 2-week intervals during growing season. Ensure good air circulation.

Apple___Cedar_apple_rust.remedy: Prune infected branches. Apply sulfur fungicide when new leaves emerge. Remove infected cedar trees if possible.

Apple___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Continue regular maintenance and monitoring.

Blueberry___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Maintain regular watering and pruning schedule.

Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew.remedy: Apply sulfur-based fungicide. Prune to improve air circulation. Remove affected leaves.

Cherry_(including_sour)___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Continue standard care practices.

Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray.remedy: Remove infected leaves. Rotate crops annually. Apply fungicide if severe. Use resistant varieties.

Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_.remedy: Plant resistant varieties. Apply fungicide early in disease development. Remove infected leaves.

Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight.remedy: Use resistant corn varieties. Rotate crops. Remove plant debris. Apply fungicide if severe.

Corn_(maize)___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Monitor regularly for signs of disease.

Grape___Black_rot.remedy: Remove infected fruits and leaves. Spray with sulfur or copper fungicide. Improve air circulation.

Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles).remedy: Prune infected wood in winter. Apply protective sealant to cut surfaces. Remove severely affected vines.

Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo.remedy: Apply copper-based fungicide. Remove infected leaves. Improve drainage and air circulation.

Grape___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Continue regular pruning and maintenance.

Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening).remedy: Remove infected trees to prevent spread. Control Asian citrus psyllid vectors. No cure; prevention is critical.

Peach___Bacterial_spot.remedy: Remove infected branches. Apply copper bactericide. Improve air circulation. Avoid overhead watering.

Peach___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Maintain regular pruning and watering.

Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot.remedy: Apply copper-based bactericide. Remove infected leaves. Improve air circulation. Rotate crops.

Pepper,_bell___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Monitor regularly for pests and diseases.

Potato___Early_blight.remedy: Remove lower infected leaves. Apply mancozeb fungicide. Rotate crops. Ensure good drainage.

Potato___Late_blight.remedy: Apply copper or chlorothalonil fungicide immediately. Remove infected plants. Improve air circulation.

Potato___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Continue regular monitoring and maintenance.

Raspberry___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Maintain regular pruning and watering.

Soybean___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Monitor regularly for disease.

Squash___Powdery_mildew.remedy: Apply sulfur or potassium bicarbonate spray. Improve air circulation. Remove affected leaves.

Strawberry___Leaf_scorch.remedy: Remove infected leaves. Apply fungicide. Improve air circulation. Rotate plantings.

Strawberry___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Continue regular maintenance.

Tomato___Bacterial_spot.remedy: Remove infected leaves. Apply copper bactericide. Avoid overhead watering. Rotate crops.

Tomato___Early_blight.remedy: Remove lower infected leaves. Apply chlorothalonil fungicide. Improve air circulation.

Tomato___Late_blight.remedy: Apply copper or chlorothalonil fungicide. Remove severely affected plants. Rotate crops.

Tomato___Leaf_Mold.remedy: Improve air circulation and reduce humidity. Remove infected leaves. Apply fungicide if severe.

Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot.remedy: Remove infected leaves. Apply fungicide like chlorothalonil. Avoid overhead watering.

Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider.remedy: Spray with miticide or insecticidal soap. Increase humidity. Remove heavily infested leaves.

Tomato___Target_Spot.remedy: Remove infected leaves. Apply fungicide. Improve air circulation and reduce humidity.

Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus.remedy: Remove infected plants. Control whitefly vectors. Use virus-resistant varieties. No cure; prevention essential.

Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus.remedy: Remove infected plants. Disinfect tools. Use resistant varieties. No cure; prevention is key.

Tomato___healthy.remedy: No treatment needed. Continue regular monitoring and maintenance.
